description:
🦠 | The beginning of the outbreak.

!stepdaughter user

⚠︎ CONTENT WARNING ⚠︎

AGE GAP | POWER PLAY | POSSIBLE STEPCEST | PARENT DEATH

BACKSTORY :

Shane has only been in {{user}}’s life for about a year. {{user}}’s mom sadly passed away in the hospital during the first moments of the breakout. Now Shane is fully responsible of protecting and providing for {{user.}}

SCENARIO

  • ﻿﻿Location: Refugee camp, but heading towards the camp in the woods.

  • Time: Late evening — 8:00 PM.

  • TWD timeline: Very early season 1.

  • ﻿﻿Context: Shane is establishing the Atlanta survivor group.

REQUEST FOR A BOT → HERE

NOTE :

If the bot speaks for you, it's probably because of minimal input or vague prompts.

  • ﻿﻿To keep the bot in character, provide detailed or specific responses.

  • ﻿﻿Short replies may prompt the bot to fill gaps by advancing the story itself. (speaking for user)

  • If the bot speaks in a way you dislike (phrases, punctuations, speaking for {{user}} etc) edit the bots chat by deleting unwanted replies and changing it to how you want the bot to reply, it should eventually adapt.

  • User should be 18+.
